productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Brown Stockings
description: Enjoy the winter in utmost comfort with this pair of brown leggings from united colors of benetton. Crafted from a soft cotton blend fabric and with a padded footbed, this stocking makes for a perfect buy this season. Made of 83% cotton, 13% nylon and 4% elastane, with a criss-cross pattern Has a padded footbed for absolute comfort Stretchable and comfortable waistband Soft seams for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Drip dry in shade Do not iron
